generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong national security. But have you considered how over-reliance on foreign tech for defense actually weakens our position? Just last year, our allies faced critical delays when their systems were compromised through supply chain vulnerabilities. Strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about ensuring we can protect ourselves when it matters most. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
